content: Text interaction flowchart showing multimodal capability and human-like interaction pathways for various AI models

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["Text-Only"] --> B["Multimodal"]
    B --> C["Traditional Streaming"]
    C --> D["Full-Duplex Streaming"]
    D --> E["MiniCPM-o 4.5"]
    E --> F["Limitation of Existing Paradigms"]
    F --> G["Blocked-I/O"]
    F --> H["Passive"]
    C --> I["The player in red is dribbling..."]
    C --> J["AI Perceives"]
    C --> K["AI Speaks"]
    D --> L["The player in red is dribbling..."]
    D --> M["AI Perceives"]
    D --> N["AI Speaks"]
    D --> O["...OH! He SHOOTS!"]
    E --> P["Full-duplex"]
    E --> Q["Proactive"]
```

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["Audio Output"] --> B["Streaming Flow Matching Decoder"]
    C["Speech Tokens"] --> B
    D["LLM Output (Token + Hidden)"] --> E["Interleaved Speech Token Decoder"]
    F["Multimodal System Prompt"] --> G["Full-Duplex Omnimodal Large Language Model"]
    H["Reference Audio"] --> I["Multimodal Encoders"]
    J["Text System Prompt"] --> I
    B --> K["Full-Duplex Omnimodal Large Language Model"]
    E --> K
    G --> K
    I --> K
    K --> L["Video Stream"]
    K --> M["Audio Stream"]
    L --> N["Audio Stream"]
    M --> N
    style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    style C fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    style D fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    style F fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    style H fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    style J fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    style K fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    style L fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    style M fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
    style N fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
```

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph (a) Non-Interleaving
        A1["Text"] --> A2["Speech"]
        A2 --> A3["Speech"]
        A3 --> A4["Speech"]
        A4 --> A5["Speech"]
    end
    subgraph (b) Interleaving with Fixed Text-Speech Ratio
        B1["Text"] --> B2["Speech"]
        B2 --> B3["Speech"]
        B3 --> B4["Speech"]
        B4 --> B5["Speech"]
        B5 --> B6["Speech"]
        B6 --> B7["Speech"]
    end
    subgraph (c) Time-aligned Interleaving
        C1["Text"] --> C2["Speech"]
        C2 --> C3["Speech"]
        C3 --> C4["Speech"]
        C4 --> C5["Speech"]
        C5 --> C6["Speech"]
        C6 --> C7["Speech"]
        C7 --> C8["Speech"]
        C8 --> C9["Speech"]
        C9 --> C10["Speech"]
    end
```
